transition_log.note: Confirmed decisions.md (all 4 decisions: thin-cache AgentStore, agent-mcp owns runtime composed_prompts table, systemPrompt compat-shim retained-as-computed, claudecli allowedBuiltinTools derives from composed.tools/AGENT_TOOL). Verified _shared.md caller map against live src tree: all callers confirmed in correct state buckets; found session.ts also imports AgentStore for agentTool.read() — consistent with agent-store-retire ownership. Architecture phase audit passed 5/5 (exit code 0).

Added composed_prompts cache table + experiment_assignments table + sessions.composed_prompt_id nullable FK column to db/schema.ts (append-only). Created ComposedPromptStore (upsert/findByAgentContext/read) mirroring agent-store.ts constructor pattern. Added ComposedPrompt interface + COMPOSED_PROMPT_NOT_FOUND error code to agent-mcp-types (additive). Authored drizzle migration 0006_composed_prompts_cache.sql + meta snapshot 0006 + journal entry. Added @nx/vite:test executor to project.json so guard --testFile flag is accepted. Guard test: 8 tests, reopen roundtrip proven by close+reopen on-disk path, exit 0. Full agent-mcp suite: 210 passed / 0 failures, exit 0. nx build agent-mcp: clean.
